body:
blxxxp:

“You keep staring at the girls making out.”

“Sure but you’re doing it with like, melancholy.”

“It means you look like you’re yearning for something you think you can’t have.”

“You know it doesn’t have to be like that, like, you’re allowed to make out with girls here to. It’s a gay bar, you can act gay, it’s not like those girls have a special gay pass, you can do it to.”

“You don’t need to come here with a date, part of the point of a gay bar is meeting gay people.”

“Sure, not everyone’s gonna be into you, but if you want to kiss a girl and you’re surrounded by queer women the rational thing to do is put yourself out there, not sit in the corner and yearn.”

“I’ll give you a hint, you start by asking the girl next to you who keeps encouraging you to try and kiss more women.”

“Sure, not everyone’s gonna be into you, but if you want to kiss a girl and you’re surrounded by queer women the rational thing to do is put yourself out there, not sit in the corner and yearn.”
